description:
Legal record (#17) in a court register/pinqas from a beit din in Cairo (on ff. 2v, 3r of T-S K22.27). In Hebrew. Location: Cairo. Dated 5 Av 5453 AM, which is 1693 CE. 

(Document #17) Upper lines of a partnership dissolution/release in the "perfumer/herbalist business (עסק העטרייה) between Yiṣḥaq Yonah and Levi b. Avraham Roditi. The lower lines of this entry appear on the left side side of f. 3v. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
